reference: Hi, this is weird, and I can't find anything on the web explaining it, but I have a place just above my belly button that hurts sometimes, and when I push on it, it feels sort of like there is a stuffed animal inside. It has been there for a long time, and it really freaks me out sometimes. Also, when I laugh hard, it feels like my organs are popping.
text: Hi, this is weird, and I can't find anything on the web explaining it. But I have a place just above my belly button that hurts sometimes, and when I push on it, it feels sort of like there is a stuffed animal inside. It has been there for a long time, and it really freaks me out sometimes. Also, when I laugh hard, it feels like my organs are popping.
